title: June 9
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|June|hide31=yes}}

'''June 9''' is the 160th day of the year (161st in leap years), with 205 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1900s#1904|1904]] – The [[London Symphony Orchestra]] is founded.
*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[John Dukakis]] is born.
*[[1981]] – [[Natalie Portman]] is born.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Episode I: The Gungan Frontier: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 4: Light and Dark]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Battle to the End]]'' published.
*2015 – [[Star Wars Insider 158|''Star Wars Insider'' 158]] published.
*[[2021]] – [[Bounty Hunters 13|''Bounty Hunters'' 13]] published.
*[[2023]] – "[[The Jedi and the Thief / The Missing Kibbin]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
